blended.narrative: Hudson Bay Mountain is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 664 ft. Looking ahead, 18 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Tuesday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
